nasb.text: The wicked are estranged from the womb; These who speak lies go astray from birth.

esv.text: The wicked are estranged from the womb; they go astray from birth, speaking lies.

cnv.text: 惡人一出母胎，就走上歧路； 他們一離母腹，就走偏了路，常說謊話。

ccb.text: 恶人生下来就步入歧途， 一出母胎就离开正道， 谎话连篇。

csbs.text: 恶人一出母胎就背弃神， 说谎的人一离母腹就迷失。
